claims.text: ================================================================ ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE - COMPREHENSIVE RESEARCH 2024 ================================================================ SECTION 1: MARKET GROWTH AND ECONOMIC IMPACT The global artificial intelligence market size was valued at $150.2 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 36.8% from 2024 to 2030, reaching approximately $1.8 trillion by 2030 according to Grand View Research.
AI is projected to contribute $15.7 trillion to the global economy by 2030, with $6.6 trillion from increased productivity and $9.1 trillion from consumption-side effects according to PwC analysis.
claims.evidence: AI is projected to contribute $15.7 trillion to the global economy by 2030, with $6.6 trillion from increased productivity and $9.1 trillion from consumption-side effects according to PwC analysis.

claims.text: SECTION 2: HEALTHCARE APPLICATIONS Deep learning algorithms now achieve 94.5% accuracy in detecting pneumonia from chest X-rays, surpassing the average radiologist accuracy of 88.7% according to a Stanford University study published in Nature Medicine (2023).
